hero.subtitle: 41 hand-picked resorts in France, Switzerland, Austria, Italy, Spain and Andorra. Real altitudes. Real ski-in/ski-out. Best price across Booking, Expedia and Hotels.com.

footer.tagline: The best snow hotels, where the lift starts at your door.
footer.disclosureText: This site contains affiliate links. We may earn a commission when you book through us, at no extra cost to you. This helps keep BestSnowHotels free.

disclosure.banner: BestSnowHotels is reader-supported. We earn a commission on bookings made through our partner links, at no extra cost to you.

home.topSubtitle: The biggest, snowiest, most ski-in/ski-out resorts in Europe — picked by altitude, snow record and bookable inventory.
home.howStep1Text: Each page lists real altitudes, piste km and ski-in/ski-out notes — no guesswork.
home.howStep2Title: See live hotels on the map
home.howStep2Text: Stay22 maps show hotels and apartments around the lifts in real time.
home.howStep3Text: Every link price-checks Booking, Expedia and Hotels.com. We earn a small commission — never from your wallet.
home.trustText: Booking.com cannot tell you whether a hotel is truly ski-in/ski-out. Resort websites do not compare prices. BestSnowHotels does both — and only that.
